hero.title: Back-End Developer
hero.subtitle: Focused on C, Node.js and low-level systems
about.title: About
about.description: Developer with experience in academic and personal projects, as well as hackathons, focusing on back-end development, databases, and applications in C and JavaScript.
projects.title: Projects
projects.descriptions.file-manager: Desktop application developed in C that implements TCP/IP communication for network file management using WinAPI and sockets.
stack.title: Stacks
stack.descriptions.c: Low-level language focused on performance and memory control.
stack.descriptions.node: JavaScript runtime for back-end focused on scalable APIs.
stack.descriptions.git: Code version control and project collaboration.
stack.descriptions.js: Interactivity and dynamic behavior in the front-end.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk?
contact.text: I'm always open to discussing new projects, opportunities or simply exchanging ideas about technology.
